form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 52-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1400m, neck behind Gorgeous Girl with 62kg at $7. The run before that 3rd in a small field at this track on January 2 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Fortress Of Fire carrying 56kg at $3.50. Continues to race well. Nicely placed to score.
